ports.name: Battery Side (BATT)
ports.note: Threaded stud terminal. Physical wire gauge maximum is determined by whichever ring terminal fits on the stud — verify maximum ring terminal size. FRC rules require 6AWG minimum; constraint lives in rules engine.

ports.name: Load Side (AUX)
ports.note: Threaded stud terminal. Physical wire gauge maximum is determined by whichever ring terminal fits on the stud — verify maximum ring terminal size. FRC rules require 6AWG minimum; constraint lives in rules engine.
